findings.location: s4 — MailRequestTableの設定プロパティ表
findings.description: The knowledge file adds a '必須' column marking properties 1–11 as '○' (required). The source table for MailRequestTable has no '必須' column and no '(全て必須)'/'(すべて必須)' qualifier in the section heading — unlike MailRecipientTable, MailAttachedFileTable, and MailTemplateTable which explicitly carry that label. The source only distinguishes property 12 (mailSendPatternIdColumnName) as optional; it does not explicitly state that the other 11 properties are required.
findings.source_evidence: Source section heading: 'nablarch.common.mail.MailRequestTableの設定' (no '全て必須' qualifier). Source table columns: No / プロパティ名 / 説明 (no 必須 column). Only property 12 has an optional note: 'メール送信パターンIDのカラム名(任意)'.
